languages.text: {n}Друкари лениво складывает руки на рукояти оружия.{/n} "Давай, мон-кай, дай повод".

traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: {n}The Drukhari eases his stance, resting his hand atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."
languages.original_text: {n}Друкари лениво складывает руки на рукояти оружия.{/n} "Давай, мон-кай, дай повод".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Drukhari lounges, folding his hands atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."

languages.text: {n}El Drukhari se prepara, apoyando la mano en la empuñadura de su arma.{/n} «Vamos, mon-keigh. Dame un buen motivo».
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari eases his stance, resting his hand atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Drukhari se prepara, apoyando la mano en la empuñadura de su arma.{/n} «Vamos, mon-keigh. Dame un buen motivo».

languages.text: {n}这名黑暗灵族放松了架势，手掌轻轻搭在武器柄端。{/n}“尽管接着说，猴子。给我一个理由。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari eases his stance, resting his hand atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."

traits.locale_text: {n}这名黑暗灵族放松了架势，手掌轻轻搭在武器柄端。{/n}“尽管接着说，猴子。给我一个理由。”

languages.text: {n}Le Drukhari relâche sa posture, la main posée sur la poignée de son arme.{/n} « Poursuivez, mon-keigh. Donnez-moi un seul prétexte. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari eases his stance, resting his hand atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Drukhari relâche sa posture, la main posée sur la poignée de son arme.{/n} « Poursuivez, mon-keigh. Donnez-moi un seul prétexte. »

languages.text: {n}Drukhari, duruşunu gevşetiyor ve elini silahının kabzasının üzerine koyuyor.{/n} "Durma mon-keigh. Bana bir sebep ver."
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari eases his stance, resting his hand atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."

traits.locale_text: {n}Drukhari, duruşunu gevşetiyor ve elini silahının kabzasının üzerine koyuyor.{/n} "Durma mon-keigh. Bana bir sebep ver."

languages.text: {n}Der Drukhari entspannt seine Haltung und legt seine Hand auf den Griff seiner Waffe.{/n} "Nur zu, Chem-Pan-Sey. Gebt mir einen Grund."
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari eases his stance, resting his hand atop his weapon's hilt.{/n} "Go on, mon-keigh. Give me a reason."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Drukhari entspannt seine Haltung und legt seine Hand auf den Griff seiner Waffe.{/n} "Nur zu, Chem-Pan-Sey. Gebt mir einen Grund."

languages.text:
{n}ドルーカリは姿勢を緩め、武器の柄の上に手を置いた。{/n}
「さあ、モンケィ。理由を言ってみろ。」
